title: Keep XP On Death by Juix
description: Datapack that lets you save your XP on death, without KeepInventory. Fully customizable ! (Milestones, Recovery percentage, or Fixed XP loss)
body:
# ℹ️ Keep XP On Death By Juix Tired of losing all your hard-earned experience points when dying, but find the vanilla keepInventory gamerule too easy? **Keep XP On Death** pack is the ultimate solution, bringing highly customizable and balanced XP recovery options to your Minecraft world!

It does not support KeepInventory enabled at the same time, maybe in a future version.
# 🆕 Commands added - **_/function gamerule:keep_xp_only/all_** - To quickly enable default settings : Full XP Recovery on death - **_/function gamerule:keep_xp_only/none_** - To quickly disable Keep XP On Death - **_/function gamerule:keep_xp_only/custom_** - To open the Config Panel : choose the way you want the XP to be recovered !

💎 Features

## 🔥 3 Recovery modes ### Milestones Recover your XP based on the last major level interval you reached (every 3, 5, or 10 levels). ### Percentage Keep a custom percentage of your experience points (from 10% to 100%) ### Fixed XP Loss Lose a set number of XP levels (as a penalty) ## 🛠️ Configuration ### Config panel ![Config panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b04b703209a6d520d2b35bb9c23fc952218c033c.png)
Using /function gamerule:keep_xp_only/custom ### Default settings ![Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a018b617d701104661ea09af451109b64c4f2a9.png)
Using /function gamerule:keep_xp_only/all # 🆕 Options - **_/function datapack:keep_xp_on_death_datapack/config_** - To open the Config panel menu, just as the other gamerule command currently does
# 🪳 Known issues - KeepInventory cannot be enabled with this pack, for now. Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
